channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Q1: CapEx Is Here, The Payoff Isn't Yet
Intel’s CEO Just Admitted Elon Musk Will Teach Them More Than They’ll Teach Him
item.description: Something rare happened on Intel (NASDAQ:INTC)’s earnings call. CEO Lip-Bu Tan effectively told investors that Elon Musk will teach Intel more about running a chip business than Intel will teach Musk. For a company that spent decades as the default answer in silicon, that’s a striking shift.

item.title: Tesla CapEx Spike Hits Stock As Intel Pops On Elon Musk Comments
item.description: Tesla Inc. is sharply ramping up capital expenditures in 2026 as the company deepens its push into AI, autonomous vehicles and robotics. $25 Billion CapEx On the company's earnings call with analysts, CFO Vaibhav Taneja said Tesla now expects capital spending to exceed $25 billion this year, a si...

item.title: Tesla Begins Cybercab Production as Robotaxi Strategy Advances
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has started production of its Cybercab, a fully autonomous robotaxi built without a steering wheel, chief executive Elon Musk said on Friday. The Cybercab marks a strategic move toward a dedicated self-driving ride-hailing platform.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Retains Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Amid $222 Million Digital Assets Losses On Paper
item.description: Tesla Inc. held onto its Bitcoin through the first quarter, but reported significant paper losses on the holdings on Wednesday. Tesla’s BTC Hoard Suffers In Bear Market The Elon Musk-led mobility giant reported $786 million in digital assets as of...

item.title: Tesla starts 'robotaxi' production: Musk
item.description: Tesla's much-touted autonomous "robotaxi", called the Cybercab, has started production, CEO Elon Musk said on Friday, the same week that the carmaker reported first-quarter profits that beat expectations.Tesla said on Wednesday it was on track to commence "volume production" of both its Cybercab ...

item.title: Tesla Starts Production of Cybercab Robotaxi, Musk Says
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Tesla Inc. has started manufacturing its Cybercab robotaxi, Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk said Friday on his social media site X, fulfilling a long-promised launch at a time when the company’s global sales have slumped.Most Read from BloombergUS Reduces Marijuana Restrictions i...

item.title: Pony.ai Outlines Autonomous Vehicle Cost Reductions, Unveils Driverless Truck
item.description: Pony AI (PONY) expects the total cost of its 2027 Robotaxi in China to drop below 230,000 Chinese re

item.title: Intel’s Tesla Terafab Deal Tests AI Foundry Turnaround Story
item.description: Tesla has selected Intel’s next generation 14A manufacturing process for its Terafab project, with SpaceX also planning to use the technology. The decision represents Intel’s first major external foundry win on an advanced node with a high profile customer. This agreement positions Intel as a key...

item.title: Tesla’s AI And Robotics Pivot Puts $25b Bet And Timelines In Focus
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) outlined a plan to focus heavily on AI and robotics, with capital investments projected to reach more than US$25b in 2026. The company disclosed a major partnership to use Intel's new 14A chip process at its Terafab fab as part of its push into custom semiconductor manufactu...

item.title: Geely's Caocao to deploy thousands of fully customised robotaxis in 2027
item.description: Caocao Inc, the ride-hailing arm of Chinese automaker Geely Holding Group, plans to deploy thousands of robotaxis globally next year, its CEO said on ‌Friday, setting up a potential rivalry with Tesla's Cybercab. Large-scale delivery and deployment of the Geely-made ‌purpose-built robotaxi Eva Ca...

item.title: SpaceX just got pulled into the biggest Weapons Program in U.S. history
item.description: SpaceX has joined a nine-company group developing the core operating software for the Golden Dome, America’s next-generation missile defense system. According to a Bloomberg report , SpaceX is focused on integrating satellite communications for military operations and is working alongside eight o...

item.title: High Oil Prices Are Driving an EV Boom. Who's the Next Winner After Tesla?
item.description: High oil prices are reshaping the global economy.

item.title: Elon Musk sounds cautious note on robotaxis as rollout goes slow
item.description: STORY: The rollout of Tesla’s robotaxi business looks to be going slower than expected. That was the verdict from several Wall Street analysts Thursday (April 23), following an unusually downbeat update from Elon Musk the day before. Over the past year, the billionaire has outlined bullish expans...

item.title: Elon Musk vs. Plug Power Stock: Here's What the CEO of Tesla Thinks About Hydrogen Energy
item.description: Elon Musk has made some surprising comments on hydrogen power in the past.

item.title: Tesla Vs GM: Which is the Best Investment as the Q1 Earnings Season Heats Up?
item.description: Tesla and GM stock may be on investors' radars as potential buy-the-dip targets as the Q1 earnings season heats up, but which is the better investment?

item.title: Gary Black Says Tesla's $25 Billion Spend Not A Surprise, Expects TSLA Valuation To Come Down Amid Self-Driving Roll Back
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC has said he expects Tesla Inc.‘s value to decline in the coming days, following a slowdown in its self-driving progress. Tesla To Decline In Value? In a post on the social media platform X on Wednesday, the investor said he expects full-year 2026 earning...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Fall On Iran, ServiceNow, Tesla; Intel Soars Late
item.description: Stocks fell on Iran news, ServiceNow and Tesla. AI plays Intel and Comfort Systems reported earnings late.

item.title: Tesla's Cybercab Pilot Production Is Underway. Is the Stock a Buy Ahead of a Potential Sales Surge?
item.description: Don't get too excited. It's going to take some time for production to ramp up.

item.title: Tesla claims boost Giga Berlin production 20%, but numbers don’t add up
item.description: Tesla lists Giga Berlin’s Model Y production capacity at more than 375,000 units per year — roughly 93,000 per quarter. The plant manager just celebrated a “record” Q1 2026 of 61,000 units and announced a 20% production increase. None of that adds up.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) maxes out $5.8 billion Chinese bank debt facility as China sales crash
item.description: Tesla has fully drawn down its China Working Capital Facility to $5.8 billion, according to its Q1 2026 10-Q filing — a 35% increase in a single quarter. The facility, which didn’t exist two years ago, now represents 64% of all Tesla’s non-recourse debt. The company tapped every available dollar ...

item.title: Redwood Materials loses COO amid layoffs, restructuring
item.description: Former Tesla executive Chris Lister is retiring, and at least three other VPs have left Redwood around the recent restructuring, TechCrunch has learned.

item.title: Stock Market Today, April 23: Tesla Falls After Lifting 2026 Capex Guidance for AI and Robotics
item.description: Today, April 23, 2026, investors confront surging AI and robotics capex that reshapes expectations for free cash flow and autonomy execution.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) executives used the company’s first-quarter 2026 Q&A webcast to outline an aggressive investment cycle centered on artificial intelligence, autonomy, robotics, and manufacturing expansion, while also pointing to improving vehicle demand trends and growing Full Self-Driving (F

item.title: Intel Needed A Lifeline. It Just Got One — And It's Got Elon Musk's Name On It
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk, speaking at the company’s first-quarter 2026 earnings call on Sunday, said that the company plans to use Intel Corp's next-generation 14A manufacturing process for chips at Terafab, the advanced AI chip complex he has envisioned in Austin. Intel Gains A Crucial Outside C...

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Sank Today
item.description: Tesla has issued new targets for robotaxis and Optimus, but is the company keeping investors waiting?

item.title: Why Microsoft passed on the AI company being bought by SpaceX
item.description: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is buying Cursor, an artificial intelligence (AI) startup, for $60 billion. Sources say that Microsoft (MSFT) was looking at buying Cursor first. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley outlines the latest.

item.title: Will Elon Musk's New SpaceX and Tesla Joint Venture Disrupt This AI Semiconductor Giant?
item.description: Musk says this tech giant isn't expanding fast enough to meet demand.

item.title: Tesla Stock Drops After Earnings Beat. Why the Market Is Losing Patience With Elon Musk.
item.description: Maybe Tesla should try missing earnings expectations. For the second straight quarter, Tesla beat Wall Street’s bottom-line earnings estimates—and the stock fell. Tesla stock also dropped after the company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter numbers in January.

item.title: Tesla's Terafab Dream
Tesla pulls back the curtain on Cybercab mass production
item.description: Tesla has provided a first look from inside a production Cybercab as it drove itself off the assembly line at Gigafactory Texas. The video footage, posted on X , opens on the factory floor with robotic arms and assembly equipment visible through the Cybercab windshield, and follows the car throug...

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is Falling After Earnings Beat: Huge Capital Spending Plans, Elon Musk Comments
item.description: Tesla earnings beat views but Elon Musk said capital spending will soar over the rest of 2026. Tesla stock fell Thursday after initially rising on results.

item.title: Tesla sees analyst support on strong auto margins, AI strategy after Q1 beat
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA)’s first quarter earnings report drew a generally positive, though measured, response from analysts at Bank of America and Wedbush, who highlighted stronger-than-expected automotive margins and continued investment in autonomy and artificial intelligence as central to the...

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips; Freeport, Oceaneering Dive As Chip Stock Breakout Cools (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index drops Thursday after an unexpected result in jobless claims. Tesla stock sells off on Elon Musk's comments.

item.title: Tesla takes crypto hit but still delivers earnings surprise
item.description: Bitcoin drop weighs on quarterly results

item.title: Tesla Delays China FSD Approval To Third Quarter Amid Regulatory Scrutiny
item.description: China approval timeline shifts from earlier February expectations as regulators maintain caution on advanced driver-assistance technology

item.title: Elon Musk’s last manually driven Tesla will do something no other production car will do
item.description: During Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call on April 22, Elon Musk made a brief but notable comment about the long-awaited next generation Roadster while describing Tesla’s future vehicle lineup. “Long term, the only manually driven car will be the new Tesla Roadster,” he said. “Speaking of which, we ma...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings Review: Joining The CapEx Race
CEO Elon Musk Just Delivered Bad News to Tesla Shareholders and Vehicle Owners
item.description: Tesla recently reported its 2026 first-quarter earnings results, followed by a conference call that fielded questions from investors and analysts.

item.title: AiLO Logistics Launches Tesla Semi Pilot in Live Freight Operations
item.description: Three-week deployment puts Class 8 electric truck on active freight lanes serving multiple customers. COMPTON, CA / ACCESS Newswire / April 23, 2026 / AiLO Logistics, a freight brokerage and asset-based carrier, today announced the start of a three-week ...

item.title: US Equity Indexes Fall as Geopolitical Risk Edges Up, Tesla's FY2026 CapEx Stuns Investors
item.description: US equity indexes fell in midday trading Thursday, as geopolitical risk ratcheted up in the Middle E

item.title: The Roadster Could Be the Only Tesla You Can Actually Drive—When It Arrives
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk late Wednesday offered his latest update on the status of the next-generation Roadster, the sleek two-door sports car first announced in 2027, reservations for which can be currently had for a cool $50,000.

item.title: Tesla Capital Spending Boost to Eventually Bring in More Revenue, UBS Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) aggressive capital spending on artificial intelligence initiatives should boost reven

item.title: Barclays Holds the Line on Tesla After Capex Shock: Is the Robotaxi Story Worth the Spend?
item.description: Barclays held its Equal Weight rating on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock with a $360 price target following the company’s first-quarter report. The call reflects a clear tension: Tesla CEO Elon Musk is asking investors to fund a materially larger spending commitment while Robotaxi scaling and autonomy ...

item.title: Tesla earnings takeaways: CapEx, robots, full self-driving
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) beat earnings and revenue estimates for its first quarter of 2026 as CEO Elon Musk struck a calmer tone in the company's earnings call. In the video above, Yahoo Finance's Myles Udland and Julie Hyman share their top takeaways from the results and the earnings call.

item.title: Top Midday Stories: Tesla Shares Fall Despite Q1 Beats; ServiceNow Says Iran War Weighed on Q1 Subscription Revenue
item.description: All three major US stock indexes were down slightly in late-morning trading Thursday, as investors c

item.title: Why SpaceX Is Going to Make Elon Musk A Tesla-Sized Boatload of Money
item.description: Anyone concerned about Elon Musk’s compensation for running SpaceX can rest easy—he’ll do just fine. Details of SpaceX’s confidential initial public offering registration statement continue to leak out as bankers and analysts meet with the company ahead of its IPO roadshow, during which those ban...

item.title: Tesla Q1: Trading On Belief, Not Results
Tesla Earnings Just Reopened The Road To $415
Tesla Model YL prototype spotted on US roads for the first time
item.description: A Tesla Model YL test mule has been spotted driving on Interstate 280 in the San Francisco Bay Area, marking the first time the longer-wheelbase, 6-seat SUV has been photographed on American roads. The sighting comes despite CEO Elon Musk’s suggestion that the Model YL might never come to the US ...
